description_long: This trash bin features a rectangular, upright body with a slightly tapered base and a wide, flat top. The main body is a dark, nearly black color, while the lid is a contrasting beige, giving it a two-tone appearance. The lid is slightly domed and appears to be a swing type, allowing for easy disposal of waste without needing to lift or remove the lid. The surface is smooth and glossy, suggesting it is made from durable plastic, suitable for outdoor or indoor urban environments. There are no visible handles, wheels, or external signage, making the design simple and utilitarian. The bin is unmarked and lacks any recycling or waste type labels.
description: A two-tone, rectangular trash bin with a beige swing lid and a glossy dark body, designed for easy waste disposal. The surface is smooth and unmarked, with a simple, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beige swing lid and the wide, flat opening for waste disposal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bin and the domed profile of the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, but without any visible opening or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the bin's depth and lid curvature.
